name: cuda-review-helper
description: Repo-local CUDA review helper for kernels, algorithm progressions, and interactive visualizations in cuda-algorithm-lab.

interface.shortDescription: Review CUDA kernels and visualizers for correctness and teaching quality
interface.longDescription: Helps review CUDA examples, algorithm progression files, Makefiles, and interactive visualizations in this repository with a focus on correctness, readability, educational flow, and consistency across the repo.
defaultPrompt: Use $cuda-review-helper to review a CUDA kernel for correctness and readability.
Use $cuda-review-helper to review a visualization page for teaching quality and consistency with the corresponding CUDA file.
Use $cuda-review-helper to check whether a folder progression is coherent and submission-ready.
